Interface Origin.AddonOrigin

All Superinterfaces:
Origin
All Known Subinterfaces:
AddonModule.ModuleOrigin
Enclosing interface:
Origin
public static non-sealed interface Origin.AddonOrigin extends Origin
An origin to be used for something provided by an addon.
See Also:
  • Origin.of(SkriptAddon)

  • Method Details

    • addon

      SkriptAddon addon()
      Returns:
      An unmodifiable view of the addon this origin describes.

    • name

      default String name()
      Specified by:
      name in interface Origin
      Returns:
      A string representing the name of the addon this origin describes. Equivalent to SkriptAddon.name().
